text:
Done. I've successfully removed the portfolio and history tabs along with all related files:

**Removed:**
- Portfolio tab from AlchemyExample.tsx
- Portfolio hooks directory (`useTokensByOwnerOnMultipleChains`, `useTokenBalancesByOwnerOnMultipleChains`)
- Portfolio types file
- Historical price hooks (`useHistoricalTokenPrices`, `useHistoricalTokenPricesBySymbol`)
- Historical price types from price.types.ts
- Portfolio type exports from index.ts

**Remaining:**
- Token Prices tab (current prices only)
- NFTs tab
- All NFT-related hooks and types

All diagnostics passed with no errors.
